form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, held ground to the line 3rd of 8 at Warwick Farm Super Mdn-Sw on March 11 over 1100m, slow going 2.5 len behind Castlejohn carrying 58.5kg at $1.75. Heavily supported on debut before tiring late, fitter now.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Was well-supported at debut, held ground to the line 3rd of 8 at Warwick Farm Super Mdn-Sw on March 11 over 1100m, slow going 2.5 len behind Castlejohn carrying 58.5kg at $1.75. Heavily supported on debut before tiring late, fitter now.

form.formComment: Back after a long spell. Finished off last campaign sat on the speed throughout before fading 8th of 13 at this track 3yo Mdn on October 1 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Ripley carrying 58kg at $9. First up last campaign 5th of 8 at Caulfield 2yo Hcp on May 10 over 1100m, 5 len behind Prince Tycoon with 55.5kg at $13. Won trial at Rosehill over 900m on March 24. Gelded over the break and keep safe after his latest trial win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Back after a long spell. form.formComment: Back after a long spell. Only had one start last preparation led but faded 2nd of 10 at Warwick Farm Superf&M Mdn-Sw on September 24 over 1200m, 2 len behind Surf's Up with 58kg at $8. When resuming last campaign 6th of 10 at Canterbury 2yo Mdn on January 5 2024 over 1100m, 3 len behind Rag Queen with 56kg at $2.50. Won a Warwick Farm trial over 816m on March 30. Resumes after a recent trial win. Resumes with the two sharp trial wins, go close.

Resumes after a recent trial win. Resumes with the two sharp trial wins, go close.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. At debut, raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 8 at Hawkesbury F&M Mdn on March 26 over 1100m, on a slow track; 0.5 len behind Ascot Green with 58.5kg at $12. Sound debut and can go on with it here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). Dual acceptor. At debut, raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 8 at Hawkesbury F&M Mdn on March 26 over 1100m, on a slow track; 0.5 len behind Ascot Green with 58.5kg at $12. Sound debut and can go on with it here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide without cover throughout the race.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when raced on the speed throughout before fading 7th of 9 at Moe Mdn-Sw on September 23 over 1017m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Kiwi Raider carrying 55kg at $3.60. Well bred filly who looks to have come back in good order with the two trials, keep safe.

Well bred filly who looks to have come back in good order with the two trials, keep safe.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow into stride. Raced three-wide without cover.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Three-year-old filly (Lonhro - News Story) will no doubt benefit from the four trials leading in today's debut. Won a trial at Warwick Farm over 816m March 30. Prefer to see how she performs under race conditions.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. Three-year-old filly (Lonhro - News Story) will no doubt benefit from the four trials leading in today's debut. Won a trial at Warwick Farm over 816m March 30. Prefer to see how she performs under race conditions.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly (Capitalist - Overreach). Gai Waterhouse & Adrian Bott has her primed for this with four recent trials leading in today's debut. Won her most recent trial at Warwick Farm over 786m on March 20. Well bred filly who will take catching from the low draw.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Three-year-old filly (Capitalist - Overreach). Gai Waterhouse & Adrian Bott has her primed for this with four recent trials leading in today's debut. Won her most recent trial at Warwick Farm over 786m on March 20. Well bred filly who will take catching from the low draw.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Having second run back today. Last outing 4th of 11 at Albury Super Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1175m, on a slow track; 1.4 len behind Borjnord carrying 56.5kg at $8. At only start last preparation 5th of 8 at Warwick Farm 2yo F Mdn-Sw on July 2 over 1200m, on a wet track; 6 len behind Tomato Toastie carrying 56kg at $21. Will come on from that run and is likely to feature.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Not seen since she finished last of 12 at this track Super 3yo+ MDN-Sw October 29 over 1400m, soft track; 17 len behind Long Legs carrying 54.5kg at $4.80. On debut fourth of 11 at Canterbury Super Mdn-Sw September 17 over 1100m, 1.75 len behind Benevac with 55kg at $41. Strengthened over the break and stays in the mix.
